APPETIZER: Fries

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

Looking at the context, the waiter hasn't been asked any questions yet - they've only been told to start. So the waiter does not know about my order yet.

The answer should be "no" - the waiter is not aware of what I chose for appetizers.
